mechanism: Managed/pegged regimes that diverge from de jure classification accumulate misalignment that eventually produces 30-60% discrete devaluations, triggering the crisis archetype. The mismatch itself is one of the 5 scoring signals.
regime_dependence: Strongest in economies with limited reserve buffers and political constraints on preemptive adjustment. Weakened where reserves are sufficient (China $3T+) or where administrative controls dampen adjustment.
